_note: Fictional example — a real RUNLOG is generated by emit_draft.py with this same schema. counts match this abbreviated example set (train 2 / heldout 1); a real emission satisfies train>=5, heldout>=3. Fields prefixed with '_' are ignored by the parser.

accepted_risks: obj-r2-1(minor): slight grading correlation between the length criterion and the format criterion (fictional example — a real record carries the council's verdicts verbatim)
